mapper.select: SELECT B.WKSTATUS ,A.IBCONFIRMDATE ,B.EXQTY ,B.CFQTY AS CFQTY ,B.RJQTY AS RJQTY ,B.COSTPRICE ,B.SALEPRICE ,A.IBHDKEY ,B.IBDTKEY ,B.IBNRCD ,A.UDF1 ,A.WKSTATUS AS WKSTATUS_HD ,A.ACKEY ,B.RJQTY AS IBRJQTY ,B.IMGHDKEY AS IBNRIMGKEY ,B.CFQTY AS IBCFGQTY ,B.AJQTY ,B.GAPREASONCD ,A.CTKEY ,A.IBHDTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_IB_DT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND B.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey}

SELECT B.WKSTATUS ,A.IBCONFIRMDATE ,B.EXQTY ,B.CFQTY AS CFQTY ,B.RJQTY AS RJQTY ,B.COSTPRICE ,B.SALEPRICE ,A.IBHDKEY ,B.IBDTKEY ,B.IBNRCD ,A.UDF1 ,A.WKSTATUS AS WKSTATUS_HD ,A.ACKEY ,B.RJQTY AS IBRJQTY ,B.IMGHDKEY AS IBNRIMGKEY ,B.CFQTY AS IBCFGQTY ,B.AJQTY ,B.GAPREASONCD ,A.CTKEY ,A.IBHDTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_IB_DT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey}

SELECT B.EXQTY ,B.CFQTY ,B.COSTPRICE ,B.SALEPRICE ,B.OBHDKEY ,B.OBDTKEY ,B.OBRSCD ,A.OBCONFIRMDATE ,B.WKSTATUS ,A.WKSTATUS AS WKSTATUS_HD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = B.OBHDKEY AND B.WKSTATUS BETWEEN '81' AND '90' AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND B.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey}

SELECT B.IBHDKEY ,B.IBDTKEY ,A.STORE_KEY ,COALESCE(A.ACKEY, C.ACKEY) AS ACKEY ,B.ICKEY ,C.TAXYN ,B.COSTPRICE ,B.SALEPRICE ,B.EXQTY ,B.AJQTY ,B.CFQTY ,B.GAPREASONCD ,B.EXTERNORDERKEY ,B.EXTERNORDERLINENUM ,A.IBCONFIRMDATE ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.DCKEY ,B.ICGRKEY ,COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(B.GAPSEQNO) FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT IBDT WHERE IBDT.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND IBDT.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY AND IBDT.IBDTKEY LIKE SUBSTR(B.IBDTKEY,1,1) || '%' ), 0) AS GAPSEQNO ,B.GAPREASONCD ,FN_GET_CTGKEY_LV(C.CTKEY , C.OWKEY , C.CTGKEY) AS CTGKEY ,D.ICUTQTY ,B.ORGCHITID ,A.CTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_IB_DT B ,TWORK_MST_IC C ,TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE D WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND B.ICUTKEY = D.ICUTKEY AND B.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND D.ICUTTYPE = 'EA' AND B.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND B.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey} AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey}
